Expected: quote with two runes for newcomer → 60 (50 base + 5 first-insurance + 5 fee)
Current error: NaN vs 60
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_23-32-48_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

The current quote() only handles single-item lookups via items[0]. Need to sum across all items. Add rune: 25 to BASE_PREMIUM_BY_TYPE, and change quote() to sum base premium across all items rather than using items[0].

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text:
All tests pass. 6 passing tests now (up from 5).

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added `rune: 25` to `BASE_PREMIUM_BY_TYPE` and changed `quote()` to sum base premium across all items using `reduce` instead of looking up only `items[0]`.
**Result**: All tests now pass (6 passing, 49 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal change required to support multi-item base premium summing. The reduce sums all item base premiums (2 runes × 25 = 50), then the existing first-insurance (10%) and processing fee logic produces 50 + 5 + 5 = 60.

File: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_23-32-48_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
